# kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumePath | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Disk Arbitration ](/documentation/diskarbitration)

- [ kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumePath ](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionwatchvolumepath)

-  kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumePath 

Global Variable# kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumePath

Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.4+

```
var kDADiskDescriptionWatchVolumePath: Unmanaged<CFArray>
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/diskarbitration/kdadiskdescriptionwatchvolumepath#Discussion)

Predefined CFArray object containing a set of disk description keys appropriate for watching volume mount changes using DARegisterDiskDescriptionChangedCallback().
